(1) These rules may be called the Cable Television Networks (Third Amendment) Rules, 2007. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the O0ici.il Oazette. 2. In the Cable Television Networks Rules, 1994, in rule 6, in sub-rule (6), for trie :irst proviso, the following proviso shall be substituted, namely: "Provided that a cable operator may continue to carry or include in his. ^soir service any television broadcast or channel, whose application for registration to the Central Government vv:;s made on or before 11th May, 2006 and is under consideration, for a period upto 31st December, 2007 or 1,1! MJI::: registration has been granted or refused, whichever is earlier."' {F.No.l60l/71/2006-TV(I)l /OHRA CHATTERJI, Jt. Secy.
